name: kosmo-plugins
description: KosmoCHE's Claude Code plugins for git workflow and research experiment management

plugins.name: git-command
plugins.description: Git workflow commands using Conventional Commits format, including commit, push-pr, amend, squash, and branch cleanup

plugins.name: experiment-log
plugins.description: 科研实验管理插件：初始化实验结构、创建新实验、归档实验、查看实验状态
